title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
